content:
𝐌𝐞𝐞𝐭 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐅𝐚𝐜𝐮𝐥𝐭𝐲 | 𝐀𝐫𝐛𝐢𝐭𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝟑𝟔𝟎°

Every Successful Arbitration begins with a Well-Drafted Agreement and a clear understanding of the Fundamentals of International Commercial Arbitration. at Jus Corpus 

We are delighted to welcome Mr. Jeevan Ballav Panda, Partner Khaitan & Co., as a Faculty Member for 𝐀𝐫𝐛𝐢𝐭𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝟑𝟔𝟎° – 𝐀𝐧 𝐈𝐧𝐝𝐮𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐲-𝐅𝐨𝐜𝐮𝐬𝐞𝐝 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐠𝐫𝐚𝐦 𝐨𝐧 𝐈𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐧𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐥 𝐂𝐨𝐦𝐦𝐞𝐫𝐜𝐢𝐚𝐥 𝐀𝐫𝐛𝐢𝐭𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 & 𝐂𝐫𝐨𝐬𝐬-𝐁𝐨𝐫𝐝𝐞𝐫 𝐃𝐢𝐬𝐩𝐮𝐭𝐞 𝐑𝐞𝐬𝐨𝐥𝐮𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧.

In the Inaugural Session, Sir will guide participants through the foundations of international commercial arbitration, including:

✔ Evolution of Arbitration
 ✔ Domestic vs. International Commercial Arbitration
 ✔ Institutional vs. Ad Hoc Arbitration
 ✔ Overview of ICC, SIAC, LCIA, HKIAC & ICSID
 ✔ Arbitration Ecosystem in India
 ✔ Practical Understanding of Arbitration Clauses

With over 𝟏𝟖 + 𝐲𝐞𝐚𝐫𝐬 𝐨𝐟 𝐄𝐱𝐩𝐞𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐜𝐞 in Commercial Litigation, Arbitration, and Employment Law, and having served as an Empanelled Arbitrator at IIAC and a Former Arbitrator at DIAC, Mr. Panda brings extensive practical experience to the programme.

Whether you are a law student, young advocate, academician, or legal professional, this session will provide a strong foundation for understanding international commercial arbitration from a practitioner's perspective.

Programme Commences: 24 July 2026
 Mode: Online through Zoom/Google Meet (Weekend Sessions)
 Super Early Bird Fee: ₹999

🔗 Explore the Complete Programme, Distinguished Faculty, and Registration Details:
https://lnkd.in/g42XcguT

We look forward to welcoming you to Arbitration 360°, where legal education meets industry practice.

𝐋𝐞𝐚𝐫𝐧 𝐟𝐫𝐨𝐦 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐟𝐞𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐥𝐬 𝐒𝐡𝐚𝐩𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐈𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐧𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐥 𝐀𝐫𝐛𝐢𝐭𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 | 𝐀𝐝𝐯𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐞 𝐘𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐋𝐞𝐠𝐚𝐥 𝐂𝐚𝐫𝐞𝐞𝐫 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐀𝐫𝐛𝐢𝐭𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝟑𝟔𝟎°

comment: Arbitration training is most valuable when it connects doctrine with drafting realities—small choices in jurisdiction, seat, and clause language often decide the fate of future disputes.
